job_details.how_you_heard_about_this_vacancy: I first saw this vacancy advertised on the Indeed.co.uk website while searching specifically for "support worker adult social care" roles in the Bristol area. After seeing the advert there, I also noticed the same role listed on your organisation’s own careers page when I went to do some background research about your services, your values, and recent CQC reports. In addition, a former colleague, Hannah Price, who now works in a similar setting, encouraged me to apply and spoke positively about the type of person-centred support you provide and the training opportunities available.
